title: astragalus cinereus
intro: Astragalus cinereus, also known as the Gray Milkvetch, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus cinereus are said to include enhanced immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and improved cardiovascular health, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Astragalus cinereus often take the form of dried root extracts or teas, and are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and modern herbalism.
